step_rationale: Granzyme B; serine protease from cytotoxic lymphocytes; degrades extracellular matrix and destabilizes plaque.
mechanism: Granzyme B from infiltrating cytotoxic lymphocytes degrades fibrous-cap collagen and is a plaque vulnerability driver in Type 1 MI.

references.title: Identification of potential therapeutic targets for plaque vulnerability based on an integrated analysis.
references.journal: Nutrition, metabolism, and cardiovascular diseases : NMCD
